Container.Name: musicd
Container.Overview: musicd is a local-network music library server and controller focused on NAS-hosted audio, album browsing, queueing, artwork, and renderer control.[br][br]Recommended for Unraid:[br]- host networking for SSDP discovery and direct renderer access[br]- /config mapped to appdata[br]- /music mapped read-only to your library share[br][br]This template defaults to serve mode, uses automatic public base URL detection for easier DHCP/IP changes, and exposes /health plus /metrics for monitoring.
Container.Requires: Host networking on the same LAN as your renderers.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Path: persistent config, SQLite database, and artwork cache

Config.Name: Mode
Config.Description: Container Variable: musicd run mode. For normal Unraid use, keep this as serve.

Config.Name: Bind Address
Config.Description: Container Variable: address and port musicd binds to inside host networking.

Config.Name: Library Path
Config.Description: Container Variable: path inside the container for the music library.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Container Variable: path inside the container for the config directory.

Config.Name: Public Base URL
Config.Description: Container Variable: public URL used in stream metadata. Use auto to derive the current Unraid LAN IP automatically at startup.

Config.Name: Instance Name
Config.Description: Container Variable: friendly backend name shown in the UI and API clients.

Config.Name: Discovery Timeout (ms)
Config.Description: Container Variable: SSDP discovery timeout in milliseconds.

Config.Name: Default Renderer Location
Config.Description: Container Variable: optional UPnP renderer LOCATION URL to preselect on startup.

Config.Name: Debug Logging
Config.Description: Container Variable: set true for verbose queue and renderer transition logs.
